opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face is throbbing, hot, and constantly leaking pus. I couldn't sleep at all because it hurts to even rest my head on the pillow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The lumps burst and are weeping and the pain kept me up all night — I want to know what to do tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 48 hours ago the deep lumps got bigger fast
symptom_narrative.duration: 2 days, worse in the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: deep painful lumps that burst and leak, skin feels hot and throbbing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — couldn't sleep, hurts to touch the pillow
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both lower cheeks mainly, and I get spots on my face and upper back too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant throbbing, worse when I lie on that side
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: pressure on the face, lying down
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the pain and the pus, feeling embarrassed and worn out
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had spots and oily skin for a while but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can do everything but I'm exhausted and don't want to be seen

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing spots/oily skin on face and upper back

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: benzoyl peroxide 5% cream from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: been very stressed recently and skin has been oilier than usual

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: distressed about appearance and wants fast relief from pain

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, tired, focused on the pain

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home thermometer reading; only mildly raised

objective_data_offered.value: both lower cheeks have grouped painful lumps that are red and weeping; forehead/back have lots of spots and blackheads
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/camera description, not a clinician exam
